title: Hushed session-handoff docs written; pnpm check skipped by owner
body: Hushed Fading Hush (codex/GPT-5/019e5a) wrote the post-M1 session-handoff docs and is stopping. Owner corrected the boundary to skip pnpm check and write handoff docs only; the in-flight check was terminated. Hushed has no active claims and the active commit queue is empty. Handoff docs now mark M1 Safe Pause / PR #108 closure as a deliberate future consolidate-docs trigger, not work for this closeout.
